title: Karate Zen George bags 46 medals
description: GEORGE NEWS - Karate Zen George had their...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Karate Zen George had their first Outside Open Tournament at Carpe Diem School on Saturday 27 April.


> Four karate clubs participated in the tournament: Karate Zen George, Kuna Kai Beaufort-West, Karate Zen Cape Town and Ryu Shin Kan Karate Gqeberha.


Karate Zen George brought home a total of 46 medals in the divisions Kata and Kumite which included 10 gold medals, 20 silver medals and 16 bronze medals.

From left to right front row: Aspito Van Neel, Shadon Lourens, Faith-Lynne Terblanche, Gartheo Fry,Winston Jansen, Kairesse Jacobs, Rozario Meyer, Jayden Jantjies and Liam Scott. Middle: Nathan Geel, Kelsey Du Plessis, Haygar Christians, Kayleigh Barry, Chelsea Jansen, Genique Abrahams and Donovan Jantjies.Back: Jean-Ethan Petersen, Jamie Langenhoven, Donique Van Rensburg, Nathan Laas, Wade Lee and their proud instructor, Sensei Mareon Ferndale. Absent: Morgan Jacobs and Henley Williams.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
